name: Fred Karlin
abstract: Frederick James Karlin (June 16, 1936 – March 26, 2004) was an American composer of more than 130 scores for feature films and television movies. He also was an accomplished trumpeter adept at playing jazz, blues, classical, rock, and medieval music.

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: I think Wynton Marsalis, no... Fred Karlin? And... oh I temporarily forget who the tenor player was...
about_quotes.doc_title: Bley Carla — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
